description: Fix Mobile Test CI Failures - Update 3 broken mobile unit tests to match current UI after PR #32 merged

userStories.title: Fix HomeScreen burn buddy and burn squad badge tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the HomeScreen burn buddy and burn squad list rendering tests to pass so that CI is green.
acceptanceCriteria: Update assertion at HomeScreen.test.tsx:173 — 'Burn Buddy' no longer appears as standalone badge (only '+ Burn Buddy' in add button). Inspect HomeScreen.tsx to find what buddy list items actually render and assert on that

Update assertion at HomeScreen.test.tsx:191 — 'Burn Squad' no longer appears as standalone badge (only '+ Burn Squad' in add button). Inspect HomeScreen.tsx to find what squad list items actually render and assert on that
Do NOT delete test logic — update assertions to verify equivalent behavior with the new UI
Test passes locally with: yarn workspace mobile test -- HomeScreen.test
userStories.notes: Replaced 'Burn Buddy'/'Burn Squad' badge assertions with partner name + streak assertions matching current UI

userStories.title: Fix FriendsScreen friend list email test
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the FriendsScreen friend list rendering test to pass so that CI is green.
acceptanceCriteria: Update assertion at FriendsScreen.test.tsx:121 — friend list items no longer display email as visible text. Inspect FriendsScreen.tsx to determine what friend list items currently render (likely just displayName and avatar) and assert on correct output
Do NOT delete test logic — update assertions to verify equivalent behavior with the new UI
Test passes locally with: yarn workspace mobile test -- FriendsScreen.test
userStories.notes: Removed email assertions; friend list items now render displayName only

userStories.title: Verify full mobile test suite passes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to confirm all 36 mobile tests pass after the fixes with no regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: Run full mobile test suite with: yarn workspace mobile test
No test logic was deleted — only assertions updated to match current UI
userStories.notes: All 36 tests pass, 6 test suites, 0 failures
